text:
is a pamphlet sold in some Japanese cinemas when the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo was released. It was created and sold by Khara inc. on 17 November 2012 for 1,500 yen.

Overview

The pamphlet begins with a summary of the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo through a series of screenshots. There are setteis presenting the characters, the Evangelions and the Angels of the film. The booklet ends with interviews with the voice actors.

Contents

Screenshots
Film Staff
Characters settei
Mechanics settei
Evangelion settei
Megumi Ogata interview
Akira Ishida interview
Megumi Hayashibara interview
Yuko Miyamura interview
Maaya Sakamoto interview
Kotono Mitsuishi interview
Yuriko Yamaguchi interview
Fumihiko Tachiki interview
Motomu Kiyokawa interview
Miyuki Sawashiro interview
Akio Ootsuka interview
Sayaka Oohara interview
Anri Katsu interview
Mariya Ise interview
Advertising

Staff

Text: Ryūsuke Hikawa
Art Direction: Ikki Todoroki
Publisher: khara Inc.
